text:
FIC EXPERIENCES
In the authors native place there was a doctor. He used to
cure dental and tooth ache problems, using a dry fruit called RAM
GULE KAY!. The fruit was mixed with pure cow milk and cow-
milk-made ghee and placed on the fire. The Vapour was passed
through a tube into one of the Teeth of the person suffering from
dental-ache. The patient was to spit the saliva into a plate, during
the course of which the Germs in the dental system would fall out,
and patient used to get relief from the toothache.
In the same manner, while performing the Sacred Fire
ritual, with specific herbs, it eliminates smoke which is not only
divine, but also has great beneficial effects both on mental and
divine faculties. Besides, as NAVA GRAHAS are also worshipped
during Homa, they also cause beneficial effects. Sacred fire
embodies PANCHA BHUTAS., and the fumes thereof have
CHEMICAL EFFECT. (BOTH IN ABSTRACT AND IN NON-
ABSTRACT FORMS).
The kind of performance of holy offerings to the Sacred fire
